prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG cyberpunk world atlas map, first batch pass, landscape orientation
Primary request: Shadowrun / Sixth World inspired cyberpunk urban-fantasy map, single huge primary continent.
Scene/backdrop: overhead birds-eye neon cartographic view of a future sprawl continent surrounded by dark ocean and matrix overlay.
Subject: one enormous primary continent covered by sprawling metropolitan districts and wilderness gaps, with complex realistic coastline: peninsulas, corporate harbor gulfs, bays, capes, narrow straits, broken industrial shores, curved coasts, polluted river deltas, inland seas, and varied landforms. Include megacorp arcology towers, barrens slums, smuggling docks, matrix access node hubs, gang territory zones, awakened forest preserves, dragon-controlled corporate enclaves, desert badlands, mountain ranges, wetlands, tundra, and coastal regions.
Style/medium: cyberpunk city-district map expanded to continent scale, matrix overlay hexagons, neon highlights on dark atlas, rain-slick dystopian cartography, high-detail illustrated RPG sourcebook map.
Composition/framing: wide 16:9 landscape, full single continent visible with generous dark ocean border, large high-resolution atlas feel, top-down map clarity.
Lighting/mood: neon-soaked corporate dystopia with street magic, perpetual night, rain haze, corporate surveillance, urban fantasy tension.
Color palette: black and charcoal base, neon cyan, magenta, acid green, amber hazard lights, deep blue ocean, muted biome colors beneath glowing overlays.
Materials/textures: wet asphalt sheen, holographic matrix grid, engraved coastlines, digital scan lines, layered translucent district overlays.
Constraints: no text labels, no letters, no readable words, no legend, no compass text, no watermark, no UI, no characters or portraits. Make the coastline natural, intricate, and realistic rather than a smooth blob.
